roles.select_permissions: Select the permissions this role will have

descriptions.owner: Full control over the workspace. Can manage all settings, members and billing.
descriptions.admin: Trusted administrator. Can manage content, members and approval workflows.
descriptions.editor: Content creator. Can create, edit and submit publications for review.
descriptions.member: Standard collaborator. Can view and interact with content.
descriptions.viewer: Read-only access. Can view content but not make changes.

roles.delete_confirmation_message: This action cannot be undone. The role

errors.cannot_edit_protected: Cannot edit this protected role (Owner, Admin or Editor)
errors.cannot_delete_protected: Cannot delete this protected role (Owner, Admin or Editor)
errors.role_has_users: Cannot delete a role that has assigned users

management.title: Role Management
management.subtitle: Manage roles and assign permissions to users

roles.insufficient_permissions_message: Only administrators and owners can manage roles
